description.value:
You have spent more of your life away from elven communities than you have within them and have grown accustomed to living surrounded by other species. You've buried more non-elven friends than most elves will make across their entire lifetimes, and you will carry the memories of these friends for centuries.

During your daily preparations, you can reminisce about a lost friend, gaining the @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feats.Item.Assurance] skill feat for one skill you're trained in. This lasts until you prepare again. Since this skill feat is temporary, you can't use it to satisfy a prerequisite for a permanent character option.
